author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev, creator David DM http://david-dm.org, co-creator & organiser @NodeBotsUK & @MeteorLondon meetups. Owner TABLEFLIP https://tableflip.io
author.name: Alan Shaw

content.text: Oh wow, @ProtoSchool just got launched at https://proto.school - learn about decentralized web concepts and how to code with them using @IPFSbot in interactive tutorials, sort of like @nodeschool! 😲
content.html: Oh wow, @ProtoSchool just got launched at https://proto.school - learn about decentralized web concepts and how to code with them using @IPFSbot in interactive tutorials, sort of like @nodeschool! 😲
